# ModernApiProject-angular

**Angular 18 Frontend — Generated by Migration Tool**

This is the Angular 18 frontend application for ModernApiProject.

## Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+ and npm
- .NET backend API running on http://localhost:5000

## Getting Started

### Install Dependencies

```bash
npm install
```

### Development Server

Run the development server with API proxy:

```bash
npm start
```

Navigate to `http://localhost:4200/`. The application will automatically reload if you change any of the source files. API calls to `/api/*` will be proxied to `http://localhost:5000`.

### Build

Build the project for production:

```bash
npm run build
```

The build artifacts will be stored in the `dist/ModernApiProject-angular/` directory.

### Running Tests

Execute the unit tests via Karma:

```bash
npm test
```

## Project Structure

- `src/app/` - Application components, services, and modules
- `src/assets/` - Static assets (images, fonts, etc.)
- `src/environments/` - Environment-specific configuration
- `proxy.conf.json` - Development proxy configuration for API calls

## API Integration

The application is configured to proxy API requests to the .NET backend:

- Development: `http://localhost:5000`
- All requests to `/api/*` are automatically forwarded

## Further Help

For more information on Angular CLI, use `ng help` or check out the [Angular CLI Documentation](https://angular.io/cli).
